response:
Yes. **Totango has a native, bidirectional integration with Salesforce.**

- Totango can **connect to Salesforce via an OAuth-based “Salesforce” connector**, allowing you to create integration jobs that import Salesforce data (accounts, users, opportunities, usage, etc.) into Totango on a schedule or one-time basis.[1][3]  
- You can also **write data back from Totango into Salesforce in real time**, so Salesforce users see customer health and key success signals inside CRM.[2]  
- Totango provides a **Salesforce app (via AppExchange)** that embeds Totango insights directly inside the Salesforce UI, letting licensed Totango users access Totango from a Salesforce tab.[6][8]  

If you tell me your use case (e.g., syncing accounts, showing health scores in Salesforce, or pushing tasks), I can outline the specific integration pieces you’d need.
